message:
fix: add session name validation to tmux creation and shell-interpolation methods (gt-zmxbj)

Previously, validateSessionName was only called in SetDynamicStatus.
Now all session creation methods (NewSession, NewSessionWithCommand,
EnsureSessionFresh, RenameSession) and shell-interpolation methods
(SetPaneDiedHook, SetAutoRespawnHook) validate session names upfront.
Invalid names (dots, colons, spaces, etc.) now return ErrInvalidSessionName
instead of causing cryptic tmux errors or potential shell injection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
